query: search="organizational learning" company case study feedback loop; filter=has_abstract:true; per-page=10; then filter=cites:W2020651972,has_abstract:true; sort=cited_by_count:desc; per-page=5
material_difference: Direct concept retrieval followed recursively through the citation neighborhood of the only returned feedback-loop case study.
eligibility_note: Both bounded API pages completed and every candidate was dispositioned; no blocked candidate and 0% net-new accepted unique is below 5%.

query: query.bibliographic=organizational learning named company case study postmortem feedback; filter=type:journal-article; rows=10
material_difference: DOI-registry bibliographic ranking focused on published company case studies rather than OpenAlex full-text relevance and citations.
eligibility_note: Candidate-level review is complete and the former blocker was accepted and ingested. The 10% net-new accepted rate is not below 5%, so this round remains honestly ineligible.

query: search_query=all:"organizational learning" AND (all:company OR all:firm); start=0; max_results=10; sortBy=relevance
material_difference: Repository-native preprint search over title, abstract, and full metadata, independent of DOI registry and OpenAlex ranking.
eligibility_note: The bounded Atom feed completed and all ten candidates were reviewed; no blocked candidate and 0% net-new accepted unique is below 5%.
